mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.name, p.description, p.category, p.age_range, p.season, p.material, p.certification, p.price, p.original_price, p.sales, p.badge, p.image_url, p.status, p.stock, u.enterprise_name FROM products p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.sales DESC, p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.name, p.description, p.category, p.age_range, p.season, p.material, p.certification, p.price, p.original_price, p.sales, p.badge, p.image_url, p.status, p.stock, u.enterprise_name FROM products p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.name, p.description, p.category, p.age_range, p.season, p.material, p.certification, p.price, p.original_price, p.sales, p.badge, p.image_url, p.status, p.stock, u.enterprise_name FROM products p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.name, p.description, p.category, p.age_range, p.season, p.material, p.certification, p.price, p.original_price, p.sales, p.badge, p.image_url, p.status, p.stock, u.enterprise_name FROM products p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (id, user_id, name, description, category, age_range, season, material, certification, price, original_price, sales, badge, image_url, status, stock, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{category}, #{ageRange}, #{season}, #{material}, #{certification}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{sales}, #{badge}, #{imageUrl}, #{status}, COALESCE(#{stock}, 0), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, age_range = #{ageRange}, season = #{season}, material = #{material}, certification = #{certification}, price = #{price}, original_price = #{originalPrice}, badge = #{badge}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE products SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE products SET stock = stock + #{quantity}, sales = GREATEST(0, sales - #{quantity}), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{productId}
